text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's summer—time for Umamusume to tackle new challenges at the
balmy beachside training camp.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Onward... to beauty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splish, splash!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah! Brilliantly now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O seems to be enjoying herself frolicking in the water, though
I'm clueless as to what kind of regimen this is.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Well, Trainer? Were you inspired by the whimsy of my water training?
choice_data_list: You showed a lot of spirit.
You showed a lot of spirit.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Excellent observation, as always. The theme for this
performance was "freeing the inner me."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Strong muscles aren't the only thing to be gained in the sea. There's
also an inner strength to be had by freely expressing one's true self.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My rippling of the water is at times serene, and at times turbulent.
What you'll witness now would make a mermaid turn green with envy!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I heard about her. She's really... something, isn't she? I know it's
fun to splash around in the water, but still...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, hehe... Yeeeah, for someone like Opera O, it makes sense.
Even when she's racing, she's really, um, at ease?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what the people around us say, Opera O continues with
single-minded determination.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now a wide turn here! Skim the sand like so... and flutter like a
butterfly!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The white clouds, the blue sea, the roaring waves, and the beauteous me! This summer will only happen once, so I must use every ounce of my being!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now I'm even less sure what she's doing, but she's doing it with gusto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is pursuing her goal without hesitation, so her trainer can't
just sit back and watch.
choice_data_list: Let's make this the best training camp ever!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well said! My training shall be ceaseless as the tides! My harmony
with the vast ocean will make the beach itself sing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our long day of training, I'm back at the dorms taking a
much-needed break.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There you are, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, I come bearing an important matter to discuss.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But first, I'd like to adjust what time we start tomorrow. What say you
to 4 a.m.?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Early, you say... Ah, you're right! Summer it may be, but the sun is yet
to rise at that hour.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We'd need more sunlight for a proper backdrop during my
performance. I agree—better to wait until a little later to start.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Then, once we've begun, I will enter the water slowly, whilst
pushing back my hair in a dramatic fashion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like a fish nestled amongst sea anemones, I'll sway and synchronize
with the waves in an elegant dance.
choice_data_list:
Some anemones are poisonous, so let's watch
out for those...

Some anemones are poisonous, so let's watch
out for those...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Really? You don't say. Then I'll be sure to keep my limbs from
becoming too acquainted with them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And after a dramatic pause, I'll burst forth from the sea, singing as the
salty droplets fall around me! Even the sirens of midsummer will fall in
love with my voice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just like a post-race concert, we must always top things off with a
heart-rousing song.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The beachgoers will be moved to tears as they celebrate me with
thunderous applause. Ah, it shall be perfect!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! I'm filled with excitement for tomorrow! Until we
meet again on the training field!
choice_data_list: Didn't you want to ask me about something?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, that. It's all cleared up now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I had several concerns related to my training, about whether I should
really continue down my own path or not.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But speaking to you just now, I was reminded that you, at least, offer
candid thoughts of concern—not denial.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your direction is to the point—never dismissive or given with your
eyes glazed over.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I knew I'd made the right decision. So I have no more need to confirm
and can proceed without fear.
choice_data_list: You were thinking about all that?
You were thinking about all that?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what? Even I have times when I question my own
actions—whether they're correct or not.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I could never let anyone see such doubt in my eyes. I'm the
Umamusume who will become the Centurial Overlord after all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh, as a true sovereign should be.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I must start preparing for tomorrow. I wouldn't want my
audience to be disappointed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes, that's right. There was one more thing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I were to ever again want to recite my thoughts on the future... may
I count on you to lend your ear?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha! I really am amazing to find such a fine trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's another wonderful day, and Opera O is doing her own thing for
training again.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look, the rising sun blesses my coming once again. I'll waste not a
second and get right to work!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
First I'll let my hair flow in the fresh sea air. A brush of the hand
through it, and then a flash of a wink to my adoring fans...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha! I am so gorgeous this day!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: That Opera O's looking, er, dreamy as ever.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, for real. I'm kinda jealous though. I wish I had that kind of
confidence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, there's not a single other Umamusume on this beach who can
equal my radiance! Wouldn't you agree, my fine trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah, you're the best, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well said! For I am to be the Centurial Overlord—she who will bathe the world in her stunning light!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is exploding with confidence. For her though, that's
just like any other day.
